questions.context_sentence: How long is it since Mrs Hill died?
questions.cn: 希尔太太去世多久了？
questions.hint: d(大) + ie(矮) -> 又大又矮的东西死(die)得快。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: When did Anna arrive in London?
questions.cn: 安娜是什么时候到达伦敦的？
questions.hint: ar(阿) + rive(河) -> 阿星游过大河，终于到达了对岸。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: When did Anna ____ in London? (提示: 到达，抵达)

questions.context_sentence: They haven't had a holiday for ten years.
questions.cn: 他们十年没有休假了。
questions.hint: holi(神圣的) + day(日子) -> 神圣的日子放假，所以是假期。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: It's ages since we went to the cinema.
questions.cn: 我们很久没有去电影院了。
questions.hint: cine(电影) + ma(妈) -> 妈妈带我去电影院。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: They haven't had a holiday for ten years.
questions.cn: 他们十年没有休假了。
questions.hint: holi(神圣的) + day(日子) -> 神圣的日子放假，所以是假期。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: They haven't had a ____ for ten years. (提示: 假期，节日)

questions.context_sentence: How long have you been doing your course?
questions.cn: 你上这门课程多久了？
questions.hint: co(一起) + ur(你的) + se(色) -> 大家一起上你的色彩课程。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: I wonder where Joe is.
questions.cn: 我想知道乔在哪里。
questions.hint: won(赢了) + der(得) -> 赢了之后还得琢磨(wonder)下一步怎么走。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: We often leave out for (but not usually in negative sentences).
questions.cn: 我们经常省略 for（但在否定句中通常不省）。
questions.hint: leave(离开) + out(外面) -> 留在外面，就是漏掉、不包括。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: We often ____ for (but not usually in negative sentences). (提示: 漏掉，忽略，不包括)

questions.context_sentence: It's ages since we went to the cinema.
questions.cn: 我们很久没有去电影院了。
questions.hint: cine(电影) + ma(妈) -> 妈妈带我去电影院。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: It's ages since we went to the ____. (提示: 电影院)

questions.context_sentence: Do you still go swimming regularly?
questions.cn: 你现在还经常去游泳吗？
questions.hint: regular(常规的，有规律的) + ly(副词后缀) -> 有规律地，经常地。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: The meeting has been going on since 9 o'clock.
questions.cn: 会议自九点起就一直在进行。
questions.hint: meet(会面，开会) + ing(名词后缀) -> 聚在一起会面，就是会议。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: We often leave out for (but not usually in negative sentences).
questions.cn: 我们经常省略 for（但在否定句中通常不省）。
questions.hint: leave(离开) + out(外面) -> 留在外面，就是漏掉、不包括。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: You can use in instead of for in negative sentences.
questions.cn: 在否定句中你可以使用 in 来代替 for。
questions.hint: in(在内) + stead(地方) + of -> 在那个地方代替，即代替。
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: You can use in instead of for in negative sentences.
questions.cn: 在否定句中你可以使用 in 来代替 for。
questions.hint: in(在内) + stead(地方) + of -> 在那个地方代替，即代替。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: You can use in ____ for in negative sentences. (提示: 代替，而不是)

questions.cn: 会议自九点起就一直在进行。
questions.hint: meet(会面，开会) + ing(名词后缀) -> 聚在一起会面，就是会议。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: The ____ has been going on since 9 o'clock. (提示: 会议，集会)

questions.cn: 我们很久没有去电影院了。

questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: The weather is dry.
questions.cn: 天气很干燥。

questions.context_sentence: It's been raining since lunchtime.
questions.cn: 自午餐时间以来就一直在下雨。
questions.hint: lunch(午餐) + time(时间) -> 吃午餐的时间就是午餐时间。
questions.title: Vocab Master
